listings.title: New Ariete Burr Mill Coffee Grinder model 3006 (AKA 45800)
listings.body: I’m in the 10536 zip code, so please figure out your distance before you contact me. Cash sales only. --- This is a new Ariete Burr Mill Coffee Grinder, model 3006, also known as model 45800. It has a 100w motor, approximately half-pound (280g) bean grinding capacity for enough beans to make 2 to 10 cups of coffee at a time. Has auto-shut off. Grinder is new, but the box is a little rough from being stored for several years.

listings.title: K'NEX NASCAR 24 DuPont Transporter Rig Building Set, 270 pc. #36170.
listings.body: BEFORE you contact me: My zip code 10536. Please calculate your distance. CASH sales only. ---- K'NEX NASCAR Jeff Gordon 24 DuPont Transporter Rig Building Set, 270 pc. #36170. NOS This is a K'NEX NASCAR 24 DuPont Transporter Rig Building Set #36170. It’s NOS [New-Old Stock] from 2010, open-box, but unopened original still-sealed bagged parts. Set has 270 pieces. NOTE: box says for age 5+, however it was made in 2010 and safety standards change over time, so I really wouldn’t recommend this for any child younger than 6.

listings.title: TinkerToy K’Nex 150-Piece Essentials Value Set #56422
listings.body: BEFORE you contact me: My zip code 10536. Please calculate your distance. CASH sales only. -------------------------- TinkerToy K’Nex 150-Piece Essentials Value Set #56422 This is the updated modern version of one of my all-time personal favorites, TinkerToy. As much as I loved the original wooden version that I grew up with (I can even still remember the distinctive smell of the wood!), I have to admit that this K’Nex version is one of the rare instances where the modern kit is actually significantly better than the original. Not only are there additional kinds of pieces, the durability and function is substantially greater (as I recall, when I was a kid I left a few of the original wooden wheels outside and they were damaged by rain). While the old wooden kit I grew up with only had about a dozen different types of pieces, this new version has 17 different kinds of pieces including some that are bendable. In just about every way that I can see, the new version is better. . . OK, maybe with the exception of the paper instructions/examples sheet. Those pages are still pretty flimsy and don’t hold up long to kids re-folding them every which way. The sheet is included, though it has a lot of mistaken folds and tears, it’s all still legible. The toy pieces are all in very nice condition! NOTE: there are two pieces missing (out of 150 total), one yellow rod (out of 16), and one red end-rod plug (out of 10). There are a few videos on Youtube of this set (not my video) if you want to see some examples of the various builds. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4TzH6ObJc90 and  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=q7ObIVyBNUw

listings.title: Backyard Safari Adventures “Magnetic Bug Habitat” kit. STEM. 2014 NOS.
listings.body: BEFORE you contact me: My zip code 10536. Please calculate your distance. CASH sales only. -------------------------- Backyard Safari Adventures “Magnetic Bug Habitat” kit. STEM. 2014 NOS, unopened This is a Backyard Safari Adventures “Magnetic Bug Habitat” kit. STEM [Science, Technology, Engineering, and Math] Educational project. Made in 2014 NOS [New-Old-Stock] HARD-TO-FIND item, out of stock most places. Product details “Backyard Safari Magnetic Bug Habitat is a critter microcosm! You have the power to control the bugs in your own little universe with this habitat! It features a water leaf dish for bugs and movable land terrain for interesting viewing of inhabitants in a life-like setting. The clear dome allows for 360-degree viewing. The magnetic wand lets you move the landscape just the way you like it! Recommended for children 5 years of age and older. •     Magnetic bug habitat with removable, easy clean lid •     Clear dome for 360 degree viewing •     Move land terrain from outside of environment with magnetic wand •     Includes habitat, magnetic wand, branch, leaf, rock and log •     Recommended for children 5 years of age and older”

listings.title: Vintage 1979 Tonka MR-970 20” Ford Bronco Steel Pickup Truck + figure
listings.body: BEFORE you contact me: My zip code 10536. Please calculate your distance. CASH sales only. --- For sale: Vintage 1979 Tonka MR-970 20” long Ford Bronco Steel Pickup Truck and Big Duke Action Figure. I know I’ve already mentioned the 20” size in the title and above. . . still, it’s surprisingly BIG! I put a penny at Duke’s foot in one photo just to give you a better idea of the overall size. Condition: truck has some surface scratches on the metal and plastic windows. Driver’s side sticker is in quite good condition, passenger’s side is not as good. Wheels all work well. Includes 8” tall Big Duke action figure with posable legs, arms, and neck/head.

listings.title: NASA Rocket 458 Piece Construction Kit. Age 12+ Erector style. NOS
listings.body: BEFORE you contact me: My zip code 10536. Please calculate your distance. CASH sales only. -------------------------- This is a NASA Rocket Construction Kit, essentially an Erector/Meccano set (though not labeled/branded as such). The kit has 458 pieces, is intended for age 12+ and the build level difficulty is rated “Hard.” All necessary tools are included in the kit. Builds to 11.8” x 6.3” x 3.9” [30cm x 16cm x 10cm Kit is NOS (New-Old-Stock), no longer manufactured, and although the box is a rather beat up, the contents are still perfect and sealed in their original unopened bag.

listings.title: Anatex Deluxe Mini Play Cube (activity cube) Alphabet, Gears, + more
listings.body: BEFORE you contact me: My zip code 10536. Please calculate your distance. CASH sales only. ***************** This is a Deluxe Mini Play Cube (activity cube) with Alphabet, Gears, Abacus, Roller Coaster, and Pathfinder sides. Originally made by Anatex, sold under both the Anatex name and through other brands, this exact vintage toy is no longer manufactured. From the product description on-line: Parent’s Choice Gold Winner Fun toys include: Mini Rollercoaster Express, Pathfinder, Counting Abacus, Pathfinder, Fun Gears and Learn the Alphabet The ultimate sensory experience Made of high-quality wood Cleans easily with mild soap and warm water Anatex Deluxe Mini Play Cube Keeping little ones occupied for any length of time can be a challenge, but the Anatex Deluxe Mini Cube Activity Center – small enough to fit on a tabletop – is packed with plenty of things to keep kids busy. The dynamic activity panels are outfitted with the Mini Rollercoaster Express, Pathfinder, Counting Abacus, Fun Gears and Learn the Alphabet, all designed to play to kids’ curiosity and build their critical cognitive skills as a result. Of course, the cube is topped with a rollercoaster bead maze, an eternal favorite of waiting rooms, classrooms and home play areas. Recommended for children age 3 Years to 6 Years. Dimensions: 12L x 12W x 24H inches. Five-sided play center with activities and rollercoaster bead maze. Games include Counting Abacus and Learn the Alphabet. Compact size great for home play areas. Includes activity center and rollercoaster bead maze. Recommended for kids between 3-6 years of age. It features: Mini Rollercoaster Express, Pathfinder, Counting Abacus, Fun Gears, and Learn the Alphabet. CONDITION: this toy has been enjoyed by kids and shows wear from many hours of play. The green wire on the Rollercoaster has some lateral movement if pushed side-to-side, however, it is still solidly anchored to the wood. In fact, it’s strong enough that I was able to pick up the entire cube just by lifting it by the green wire alone. There’s almost no chance it will separate in normal play. The paint on the Learn the Alphabet tiles has deteriorated somewhat and sometimes flakes off. I’ve sprayed over it with an acrylic clear coat to help solidify it. The letters and numbers themselves are carved into the tiles, so even if the paint wears off the carved labels will still remain intact.

listings.title: Rare SEALED BOX Vintage 1977 LEGO 709 Police Boat. New-old-stock.
listings.body: ********* My zip code 10536. Please use Google to check where you are in relation to where I am to see if it's worth your travel. Cash only. ********* This is an exceptionally rare vintage 1977 LEGO 709 Police Boat still sealed in original box. Note, the plastic wrap seal has a long tear from the upper right corner, across the length of the front, to the mid-point of the left side. See photos, particularly the last few close-ups, to evaluate. As you will see, the box has never been unwrapped or opened, but technically it’s not “hermetically” sealed, its still just sealed from human contact. Box has some minor denting, particularly on corners, see photos. When assembled, the boat can float on water. This kit includes a mini-figure of a policeman. 53 pieces.
